landing.description: NoiseWatch is an app made as a thesis project, where you can both view data and help collect it.

learnMore.title: NoiseWatch
learnMore.description: NoiseWatch is an app made as a thesis project, where you can both view data and help collect it.

features.title: Monitor Noise Pollution
features.desc: See noise levels around you on a map.

features.title: Predict Noise Pollution
features.desc: Know what noise to expect in the next hours, days or weeks.

features.title: Contribute by Adding Datapoints
features.desc: Help the community by measuring and sharing noise levels wherever you are. Every reading makes the map smarter.

features.title: Get Achievements and Land on the Leaderboard
features.desc: Earn badges for your contributions and see how you stack up against other noise fighters.
